sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import AnimateIn from "../components/ui/AnimateIn"; import SectionHeader from "../components/ui/SectionHeader"; import CredentialsBar from "../components/ui/CredentialsBar"; import { STATS, PRACTICE_AREAS, TESTIMONIALS, TEAM_MEMBERS, ABOUT_HIGHLIGHTS, VALUES, TAGLINE, FIRM_HEADLINE, FIRM_DESC } from "../data"; const Home: React.FC = () => ( <> {/* ══ HERO ══ */}
{/* Decorative scales glyph */}
⚖
{/* Eyebrow */}
Advocates, High Court of Bombay
{/* Logo mark */}
{/* Main headline */}

{FIRM_HEADLINE.split("•").map((part, i, arr) => ( {part.trim()} {i < arr.length - 1 && •} ))}

{/* Tagline */}

{TAGLINE}

{FIRM_DESC}

Schedule a Consultation Our Practice Areas →
{/* Scroll indicator */} Scroll
{/* ══ CREDENTIALS BAR ══ */} {/* ══ STATS ══ */}
{STATS.map((s, i) => (
{s.value}
{s.label}
 ))}
{/* ══ WHO WE ARE ══ */}
{/* Left text */}
Who We Are

A full-service law firm
based in Navi Mumbai,

serving a dynamic legal and business environment.

{ABOUT_HIGHLIGHTS.map((h, i) => (
{h.icon}
{h.title}
{h.desc}
))}
Learn More About Us Get in Touch
{/* Right — team photos strip */}
{/* Background accent */}

"Enduring Values. Delivering Results."

{TEAM_MEMBERS.map(m => (
{m.name}
{m.title}
))}
{["Full-Service", "Litigation", "Advisory", "Business-Focused"].map(tag => (
{tag}
))}
{/* ══ PRACTICE AREAS ══ */}
Integrated Legal Support Across All Disciplines} subtitle="Integrated legal support across disputes, transactions and compliance." centered light />
{PRACTICE_AREAS.map((area, i) => (
{area.icon}
{`0${i + 1}`}

{area.title}

{area.shortDesc}

Explore → ))}
View All Practice Areas
{/* ══ WHY PAUL LEGAL ══ */}
Why Choose Us

Why Paul Legal Associates

Strategic counsel rooted in enduring values.

{VALUES.map((v, i) => (
{v.icon}

{v.title}

{v.desc}

 ))} {/* Quote card */}
"

Clarity in strategy. Precision in execution.

Paul Legal Associates
{/* ══ TESTIMONIALS ══ */}
What Our Clients Say} centered light />
{TESTIMONIALS.map((t, i) => (
"

{t.quote}

{t.author}
{t.matter}
 ))}
{/* ══ CTA BANNER ══ */}

Let's Build a Stronger Legal Position

Connect with Paul Legal Associates for strategic legal support.

Precision in Law. Clarity in Counsel. Confidence in Outcomes.

Schedule Consultation Meet Our Advocates
); export default Home;
